Alex Chen
Staff Software Engineer

WORK HISTORY
Staff Software Engineer, Meridian Cloud (2022 - Present)
  - Architected a multi-region Kubernetes platform on AWS serving 200+ internal services.
  - Drove adoption of Python/Django and Go across the platform team.
  - Mentored 6 engineers; ran the org's system design review process.

Senior Software Engineer, Halcyon Data (2019 - 2022)
  - Built data pipelines in Python, orchestrated via Airflow, backed by PostgreSQL and S3.
  - Led migration from on-prem to AWS.

Software Engineer, Vantage Systems (2016 - 2019)
  - Developed backend services in Python and Java for a fintech payments platform.
  - Implemented PostgreSQL schema and query optimization for high-throughput transaction processing.

Junior Developer, Openfield Software (2014 - 2016)
  - Maintained internal tooling in Python.

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science, Tech Institute (2012 - 2014)
B.S. Computer Science, Tech Institute (2008 - 2012)

SKILLS
Python, Django, Go, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Airflow, Docker, System Design, Java, Mentoring
